home.heroTitle: Discover the Hidden Wonders of Egypt
home.heroSubtitle: Experience Egypt beyond the pyramids. Explore authentic culture, stunning landscapes, and luxury tourism.
home.mapSubtitle: Explore Egypt's rich history. Click on any governorate label to fly to the region, view local landmarks, and browse top destinations.
home.feat1Desc: Expertly designed travel plans bringing Egypt's rich history directly to your itinerary.
home.feat2Desc: Set your budget, select your preferred tourism types, and get a tailored tour plan in seconds.
home.feat3Desc: Hassle-free checkout via Stripe or PayPal with instant confirmation and easy cancellations.
home.categoriesSubtitle: Explore Egypt according to your personal interests and travel styles.
home.trendingSubtitle: Discover the most highly-rated destinations loved by travelers.
home.featuredGovSubtitle: From coastal havens to historical heartlands, find your next destination.
home.promoDesc: Why stick to predefined tours when you can curate your own? Specify your budget, trip duration, preferred style of tourism, and let our smart planner draft flights, hotel choices, and top landmarks for you.
